name: Date Bar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, milk, and oleo in a saucepan. Heat over medium heat until it reaches the soft ball stage (235°F/112°C on a candy thermometer).
2. Remove from heat and stir in dates and nuts until well combined.
3. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or waxed paper.
4. Place the mixture on the prepared surface and spread into an even layer about 1/2 inch thick.
5. Cover the mixture with another sheet of parchment or waxed paper.
6. Roll up the logs, twisting the ends to secure.
7. Place the logs in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
8. Allow the bars to firm up completely, which may take several hours or overnight.
9. Once set, unroll the bars and cut into desired sizes.
10. Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to one week.
